name: The Middleby Corporation
description: The Middleby Corporation is a leading global manufacturer of commercial cooking equipment, industrial food processing systems, and residential kitchen appliances. Headquartered in Elgin, Illinois, the company designs, manufactures, markets, and services a wide range of innovative solutions for the foodservice, food processing, and residential industries. With a diverse portfolio of highly respected brands, Middleby provides advanced technology and equipment that enhance efficiency and performance in food preparation, beverage service, and industrial production, serving a broad customer base across the globe through its extensive network of manufacturing and distribution facilities.
